LABEL: SIGNUP_OK
lifted_nl: whenever signup(u,p) is called, it must hold that u ∉ dom(R); always after signup(u,p) succeeds, R becomes R ∪ {u → hash(p)}
Postcondition: C'=C ∪ {u → hash(p)} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: LOGIN_OK
lifted_nl: whenever login(u,p) is called, it must hold that hash(p) = R(u) ∧ u ∉ dom(T)
Postcondition: T'=T ∪ {token → u} AND C'=C AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: ONBOARDING_STEP_K_OK
lifted_nl: whenever submit_onboarding_step_k(p) is called, it must hold that p's onboarding state = STEP_k and p's session token is in dom(T); always after submit_onboarding_step_k(p) succeeds, p's onboarding state becomes STEP_k+1; after Step 6, state becomes ONBOARD_DONE
Precondition: p's onboarding state = STEP_k ∧ p's session token ∈ dom(T)
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual ∪ {p → STEP_k+1} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl; if k=6 then Qual'=Qual ∪ {p → ONBOARD_DONE}

LABEL: INITIAL_QUALIFICATION_APPLICATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever InitialQualificationApplication(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = Q_INIT; always after InitialQualificationApplication(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes UNDER_EXAM
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->UNDER_EXAM} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SEMI_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SemiQualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM; always whenever Semi-Qualify(p) is called, QualState becomes TRAINING
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->TRAINING} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: FULLY_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Fully-Qualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState = UNDER_EXAM; always after Fully-Qualify(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->ACTIVE} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: DISQUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Disqualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM; always after Disqualify(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes REJECTED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->REJECTED} AND T'=T AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SUSPEND_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SuspendPlumber(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = ACTIVE; always after SuspendPlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes SUSPENDED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->SUSPENDED} AND T'=T AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: REINSTATE_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ReinstatePlumber(p) is called, QualState must hold that QualState = SUSPENDED; always after ReinstatePlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->ACTIVE} AND T'=T AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: RAISE_COMPLAINT_OK
lifted_nl: always after RaiseComplaint(c) succeeds, Compl is added to {c → ComplaintRecord(c, RAISED)}
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl ∪ {c → ComplaintRecord(c, RAISED)}

LABEL: ASSIGN_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever AssignPlumberToComplaint(c, p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord(c).state = RAISED and Qual(p) = ACTIVE, and after succeeds, ComplaintRecord[c].plumber becomes p and ComplaintRecord[c].state becomes ASSIGNED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl ∪ {c → ComplaintRecord(c, ASSIGNED, p)}

LABEL: PLUMBER_ACCEPTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberAcceptsAssignment(p,complaintId) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[complaintId].state = ASSIGNED and ComplaintRecord[complaintId].plumber = p, and after succeeds, ComplaintRecord[complaintId].state becomes UNDER_EXAM_C
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl ∪ {complaintId → ComplaintRecord(complaintId, UNDER_EXAM_C, p)}

LABEL: PLUMBER_REJECTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberRejectsAssignment(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[c].state = ASSIGNED and ComplaintRecord[c].plumber = p; always after PlumberRejectsAssignment(c,p) succeeds, ComplaintRecord[c].state becomes RAISED and ComplaintRecord[c].plumber becomes null
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.state=RAISED, .plumber=null} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND C'=C

LABEL: RAISE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RaiseQuotation(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[c].state = UNDER_EXAM_C; always after RaiseQuotation(c,p) succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes ComplaintRecord with quotation set to items and state becomes QUOTATION_RAISED
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.quotation=items, .state=QUOTATION_RAISED} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND C'=C

LABEL: APPROVE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ApproveQuotation(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = QUOTATION_RAISED; always after ApproveQuotation(c,p) succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes UNDER_EXEC
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {c|->ComplaintRecord.state=UNDER_EXEC} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND C'=C

LABEL: REJECT_QUOTATION_ABANDON_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RejectQuotationAbandon() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = QUOTATION_RAISED and always after RejectQuotationAbandon() succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes ABANDONED
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->ABANDONED} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: MARK_TASK_COMPLETED_OK
lifted_nl: whenever MarkTaskCompleted() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = UNDER_EXEC and always after Mark Task Completed, ComplaintRecord becomes PAYMENT_PENDING
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->PAYMENT_PENDING} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: MAKE_PAYMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Make Payment is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord = PAYMENT_PENDING and always after Make Payment succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes DONE
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->DONE} AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: SUBMIT_FEEDBACK_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SubmitFeedback(c,p,m) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord(complaintId) = DONE; always after SubmitFeedback(c,p,m) succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes ComplaintRecord + {complaintId : feedback}
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {c|->Compl(c) + {complaintId : feedback}}
